---
title: "Useful apps for South Korea"
description: "A collection of apps useful for travel and daily life in South Korea."
categories: ["korea"]
date: "2024-11-16"
draft: true
comments: false
---

Listed roughly in order of importance. Let me know if I missed any important ones!

## Essential

### KakaoTalk | 카카오톡

### Papago | 파파고

### Naver Dictionary | 네이버 사전

### Airalo / Ubigi

## Misc.

### Catchtable | 케치테이블

### Naver | 네이버

### 17Track

## Social

### Meetup

### 소모임

## Navigation

### Naver Maps | 네이버 지도

###  Kakao Maps | 카카오맵

### Ddareungi | 따릉이
related: [How to use Ddareungi, Seoul’s rental bike](https://www.koreaherald.com/view.php?ud=20210708000313)

### Kakao T | 카카오 T

### k.ride

### Korail

## Shopping

### Coupang | 쿠팡

### Emart

### GMarket

## Food Delivery

### Shuttle

### 요기요

### 배달민원

## Sending Money

### Revolut

### Payco

### Toss | 토스

### 카카오 페이

### Hana 은행EZ


## AVOID THESE

### 피터판 / 직방
(instead search on Naver - 매물)
